description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that triggers on push events, excluding paths related to mac and windows workflows, .gitignore, and specific directories. Run a build job on ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04, checking out code with a fetch depth of 2, installing build dependencies, autogen.sh, configure, and make. Perform additional steps like make install, make check with specific CFLAGS, and gcov on ubuntu-22.04. Upload code coverage to Codecov and artifacts on ubuntu-22.04.
